description_long: This is a rugged, military-style all-terrain vehicle with a boxy, utilitarian design and a canvas-covered rear cargo area. The body is primarily constructed from metal, featuring a matte olive-green finish with visible weathering and rust, suggesting extensive outdoor use. The front end has a flat grille, round headlights, and a robust bumper, while the sides display two doors with simple handles and black side mirrors. The wheels are large, black, and fitted with thick, all-terrain tires suitable for rough surfaces. The rear is covered by a gray canvas top, with a small window and visible taillights, and the undercarriage hints at a solid axle suspension system. The overall appearance is functional and durable, designed for off-road capability and utility in urban or rugged environments.
description: A weathered, olive-green all-terrain vehicle with a canvas-covered rear, large black tires, and a boxy, utilitarian design. It features a flat front grille, round headlights, and a rugged, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat grille, round headlights, and robust bumper, emphasizing the vehicle's utilitarian and rugged front design.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying two doors, black side mirrors, large all-terrain tires, and the canvas-covered rear cargo area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the gray canvas top, small rear window, taillights, and the sturdy rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, side mirrors, and the full length of the vehicle with its rugged tires.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves, designed for enhanced grip on both paved and unpaved surfaces.
